query_title: What's Love Got to Do with It?

recommendations.title: Elizabeth
recommendations.overview: The story of the ascension to the throne and the early reign of Queen Elizabeth the First, the endless attempts by her council to marry her off, the Catholic hatred of her and her romance with Lord Robert Dudley.

recommendations.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
recommendations.overview: When Queen Elizabeth's reign is threatened by ruthless familial betrayal and Spain's invading army, she and her shrewd adviser must act to safeguard the lives of her people.

recommendations.title: The Four Feathers
recommendations.overview: A young British officer resigns his post when he learns of his regiment's plan to ship out to the Sudan for the conflict with the Mahdi. His friends and fiancée send him four white feathers as symbols of what they view as his cowardice. To redeem his

recommendations.title: Mr. India
recommendations.overview: A poor but big-hearted man takes orphans into his home. After discovering his scientist father's invisibility device, he rises to the occasion and fights to save his children and all of India from the clutches of a megalomaniac.

recommendations.title: Love per Square Foot
recommendations.overview: Individually, bank employees Sanjay and Karina don't earn enough to be able to buy a home, so they decide to enter into a marriage of convenience.

recommendations.title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
recommendations.overview: A young mute girl from Pakistan loses herself in India with no way to head back. A devoted man with a magnanimous spirit undertakes the task to get her back to her motherland and unite her with her family.

recommendations.title: The Big Sick
recommendations.overview: Pakistan-born comedian Kumail Nanjiani and grad student Emily Gardner fall in love but struggle as their cultures clash. When Emily contracts a mysterious illness, Kumail finds himself forced to face her feisty parents, his family's expectations, and

recommendations.title: New York, I Love You
recommendations.overview: New York, I Love You delves into the intimate lives of New Yorkers as they grapple with, delight in and search for love. Journey from the Diamond District in the heart of Manhattan, through Chinatown and the Upper East Side, towards the Village, into
recommendations.director: Natalie Portman, Shekhar Kapur, Mira Nair, Fatih Akin, Yvan Attal, Jiang Wen, Shunji Iwai, Allen Hughes, Joshua Marston, Brett Ratner, Randall Balsmeyer

recommendations.title: Udaan
recommendations.overview: Upon returning to his industrial hometown, a young man must decide whether to follow his own dreams or acquiesce to his father's plans for his future.

recommendations.title: Dolls
